title: Asset
content:
# Asset

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### create_asset_bulk(dry_run: Optional[bool], data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetBulkCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Create new Assets.


### delete_asset_bulk(data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetBulkDelete, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Delete a list of existing Assets.


### create_asset(data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetCreate

Create a new Asset.


### list_assets(search: Optional[Sequence[str]], names: Optional[Sequence[str]], asset_type_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], status_state: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.Asset], responses.AssetsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Assets and its parameters. The Assets can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### list_assets_advanced(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetsAdvancedList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.Asset], responses.AssetsAdvancedListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Assets and its parameters. The Assets can be filtered and sorted on the server before being returned. Advanced filter options available for more granular return list.


### get_asset_status_count(_dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetStatusCountGet

Retrieve the total count of Assets grouped by the parameter `status`.


### get_asset_status_current(_dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetStatusCurrentGet

Returns a list of all Assets and their current status (`state`).


### create_asset_type(data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetTypeCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetTypeCreate

Create a new Asset Type.


### delete_asset_type_bulk(data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetTypeBulkDelete, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Delete a list of existing Asset Types.


### list_asset_types(search: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.AssetType], responses.AssetTypesListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Asset Types and its parameters. The Asset Types can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### list_asset_types_advanced(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetTypesAdvancedList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.AssetType], responses.AssetTypesAdvancedListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Asset Types and its parameters. The Asset Types can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### delete_asset_type(asset_type_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Asset Type. An error will be returned if there are any current links to an Asset. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### get_asset_type(asset_type_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetTypeGet

Retrieves the parameters of an Asset Type. **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.asset_type.read`.


### update_asset_type(asset_type_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetTypeUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetTypeUpdate

Updates an existing Asset Type with any new values passed through the body parameters. All body parameters are optional and if not provided will remain unchanged. Only the unique identifier `name` can not be changed.


### delete_asset(asset_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Asset. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### get_asset(asset_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetGet

Retrieve the parameters of an Asset.


### update_asset(asset_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.AssetUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.AssetUpdate

Update an existing Asset with any new values passed through the body parameters. The minimum required in the body parameters is `title`. If this body parameter does not need to be changed, it should still have the original Display Name (`title``) given. Any other body parameters that are not required and not provided will remain unchanged.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.asset.create_asset_bulk()
